text:
Created attachment 253186
diff file for update to 1.40.5.8921

multimedia/plexmediaserver: Update to 1.40.5.8921

 * New release from Plex.tv

  Changelog:

   https://forums.plex.tv/t/plex-media-server/30447/642

    NEW:
     (Log) Reduced the number of log messages generated when
      starting playback on an NVIDIA device.
     (Windows) noautorestart command line parameter added which
      prevents PMS from restarting after an auto update.

    FIXES:
     (Analysis) Preview thumbnail generation would not run on
      newly added media regardless if the preference was set.
     (FFmpeg) Patched for CVE-2024-7272.
     (Lyrics) Sidecar lyrics would fail to load.
     (QNAP) PMS might not start in all cases after QTS/QuTS
      restart.
     (View State Sync) Item plays could be duplicated when state
      synced from service.
     (ViewStateSync) Fewer requests to plex.tv endpoints.
     (Windows 64bit) Not all files were removed on uninstall.
     Plex Media Server could crash when falling back to SW
      encoding.
     (ToneMapping) Tonemapping on linux with Gemini Lake devices
      would crash after a period of time.
     (ToneMapping) Tonemapping on linux with some Intel devices
      caused the transcoder to crash

  QA:

   portlint OK
